connectionParameters.label: Bot Token
connectionParameters.name: bot_token
connectionParameters.desc: The Telegram Bot API token obtained from BotFather

connectionParameters.label: Server URL
connectionParameters.name: server_url
connectionParameters.desc: Custom Telegram Bot API server URL. Defaults to https://api.telegram.org if not provided.

connectionParameters.label: Chat ID
connectionParameters.name: chat_id
connectionParameters.desc: The default chat ID to send messages to and retrieve chat info from

desc: Telegram Bot integration allows you to send messages and retrieve updates via the Telegram Bot API for automated notifications and alert workflows.

functions.desc: Send a text message to the configured Telegram chat
functions.label: Send Message
functions.name: send_message

inParameters.label: Parse Mode
inParameters.name: parse_mode
inParameters.desc: Message formatting mode. Supported values: Markdown, HTML. Leave empty for plain text.

outParameters.label: Message ID
outParameters.name: message_id
outParameters.desc: The ID of the sent message

functions.desc: Retrieve recent messages and updates received by the bot
functions.label: Get Updates
functions.name: get_updates

inParameters.label: Limit
inParameters.name: limit
inParameters.desc: Maximum number of updates to retrieve (1-100). Defaults to 10.

inParameters.label: Offset
inParameters.name: offset
inParameters.desc: Identifier of the first update to be returned. Use the update_id of the last received update + 1 to fetch only newer updates.

outParameters.label: Messages
outParameters.name: messages
outParameters.desc: List of messages with update_id, message_id, from, chat_id, date, and text
